title: Artificial intelligent systems and methods for map matching
abstract: A system and a method for map matching are disclosed. The system may perform the method to: obtain a GPS track including a plurality of positions (510); for each position of the plurality of positions, obtain at least one candidate match, each of the at least one candidate match including the position and a road segment within a first predetermined distance from the position (520); for each of the at least one candidate match, determine a measurement probability based on at least one of a trained supervised learning model or a road completion model (530); determine a route that matches with the GPS track based on the measurement probabilities (540); and direct a user terminal to display a matching between a current location associated with the user terminal and the determined route (550).
claims: Claims ( 24 ) AnĂ‚Â artificialĂ‚Â intelligentĂ‚Â systemĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â mapĂ‚Â matching,Ă‚Â comprising: atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â storageĂ‚Â mediumĂ‚Â includingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â setĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â instructionsĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â mapĂ‚Â matching;Ă‚Â and atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â communicationĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â storageĂ‚Â medium,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â whenĂ‚Â executingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â setĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â instructions,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â directedĂ‚Â to: obtainĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â saveĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â cacheĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â structuredĂ‚Â dataĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â GPSĂ‚Â trackĂ‚Â includingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â positions,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â adjacentĂ‚Â positionsĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â positionsĂ‚Â respectivelyĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â adjacentĂ‚Â timeĂ‚Â point;
